building_row.management_company: Greystar California, Inc. dba Greystar Corp.
building_row.open_questions: Verify whether the exact available unit faces Highland or the courtyard, how often rooftop and meeting-room rentals generate late noise, and whether package intake is locker-based or staff-managed after hours.
building_row.notes: Silhouette is a strong paper fit with in-unit washer and dryer, dishwasher, central AC, controlled access, EV charging, package service, secure underground parking, and detailed fee disclosure. The main tradeoff is that it is a brand-new mixed-use building on Highland with rooftop spa and lounge areas plus ground-floor retail, so real-world quiet and management performance are still lightly evidenced. Apartments.com shows only two renter reviews and the crawler did not expose substantive review text, which keeps management confidence low rather than negative.

evidence_rows.claim: The official site markets rooftop lounges, meeting rooms, business centers, courtyards with fire pits, and a fitness studio.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Official amenities page lists expansive recreation rooms with full kitchens, state-of-the-art fitness studios, relaxing courtyards with fire pits, breathtaking rooftop lounges, professional meeting rooms and business centers, outdoor yoga spaces, rooftop spa retreat, and secure underground parking.

evidence_rows.claim: The official residences page confirms core in-home essentials including stainless appliances, dishwasher, full-size washer and dryer, smart home technology, and EV charging stations.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Official page states premium stainless appliances including fridge, range, and dishwasher, in-unit full-size washer and dryer, smart home technology, floor-to-ceiling windows, select balconies, and EV charging stations.

evidence_rows.claim: Greystar publishes total monthly pricing language and a detailed required-fee schedule for utilities, SCEP, pest control, and administrative utility billing.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Greystar states total monthly leasing price includes base rent and mandatory monthly costs, then lists SCEP fee at $2.83 monthly, utility billing administrative fee at $6.06 monthly, pest control at $2 monthly, and usage-based trash, electric, sewer, water, and hot water energy charges.

evidence_rows.claim: Apartments.com provides unusually detailed pet, parking, EV parking, package-service, deposit, and situational fee disclosures.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Apartments.com lists cat restrictions as none, pet deposit $500, pet rent $50 monthly, standard parking $100 monthly, EV parking $175 monthly, tandem parking $150 monthly, package services $3 per occurrence, application fee $35, and security deposit $500 to $1,000.

evidence_rows.claim: Third-party listings consistently describe controlled access, key fob entry, package service, EV charging, and secure underground parking.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Community amenities section lists package service, controlled access, maintenance on site, EV charging, key fob entry, elevator, lounge, conference rooms, spa, roof terrace, courtyard, and secure underground parking.

evidence_rows.claim: Resident-review depth is still thin, which limits confidence in management and quiet operations despite positive headline scores.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Apartments.com shows a 5.0 blended score with 2 renter reviews, but the retrieved page also says there are no reviews available to read, so the public resident record is too shallow to treat as strong proof of operations.

evidence_rows.claim: The building is very new, mixed-use, and includes ground-floor retail plus rentable amenity spaces, which increases the need to verify day-to-day operations in person.
evidence_rows.source_name: LADBS permit record for 1233 N Highland Ave
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: City permit record describes a 72-unit mixed-use project over retail and garage, with certificate of occupancy issued on 2026-01-05. The newness helps condition but means there is not much long-term operational evidence yet.

evidence_rows.claim: Silhouette is in a highly walkable Hollywood location on Highland, which is convenient but not inherently low-noise.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Greystar calls the building tucked away among the energetic buzz of Hollywood, while Walk Score is 96 and the site highlights retail, dining, and nightlife access. That supports strong convenience but also moderate ambient activity risk, especially for Highland-facing units.

packet_markdown:
# Silhouette Apartments building packet

## Snapshot
- Building ID: silhouette-apartments-1233-n-highland-ave
- Address: 1233 N Highland Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90038
- Primary URL: https://www.silhouettela.com/
- Management company: Greystar California, Inc. dba Greystar Corp.
- Recommended status: tour_candidate
- Last updated: 2026-03-25

## Scorecard
- Quiet: 3 (medium, evidence count 3)
- Management: 3 (low, evidence count 3)
- Amenity: 5 (high, evidence count 6)
- Community stability: 3 (low, evidence count 2)
- Location fit: 5
- Pricing transparency: 5

## Risks
- Structural noise risk: medium
- Location noise risk: medium
- Security risk: low
- Pricing risk: low

## Evidence summary
- [official] The official amenities page lists rooftop lounges, meeting rooms, business centers, courtyards with fire pits, a rooftop spa retreat, and secure underground parking. Source: Silhouette official amenities page (https://silhouettela.com/amenities/). Note: Amenity stack is unusually strong for work-from-home and package-era living.
- [official] The residences page confirms stainless appliances, dishwasher, full-size washer and dryer, smart home tech, and EV charging stations. Source: Silhouette official residences page (https://silhouettela.com/residences/). Note: This checks your essential in-unit boxes.
- [official] Greystar publishes total monthly pricing language plus detailed mandatory fee disclosures. Source: Greystar property page for Silhouette (https://www.greystar.com/silhouette-los-angeles-ca/p_21877). Note: Monthly SCEP, pest, and utility admin fees are clear, while utility consumption remains variable.
- [review] Apartments.com also discloses parking, EV parking, pet, package, deposit, and situational fees. Source: Apartments.com listing (https://www.apartments.com/silhouette-apartments-los-angeles-ca/7h539fy/). Note: Parking at $100 monthly and EV parking at $175 monthly are important all-in budget inputs.
- [review] Apartments.com lists package service, controlled access, key fob entry, EV charging, lounge, conference rooms, and secure underground parking. Source: Apartments.com listing (https://www.apartments.com/silhouette-apartments-los-angeles-ca/7h539fy/). Note: Security and package handling look promising on paper.
- [review] Resident evidence is still thin. Source: Apartments.com listing (https://www.apartments.com/silhouette-apartments-los-angeles-ca/7h539fy/). Note: Only two renter reviews are visible at headline level and review text was not exposed in the retrieved page.
- [public_record] LADBS shows certificate of occupancy issued on 2026-01-05 for a 72-unit mixed-use project over retail and garage. Source: LADBS permit record (https://www.ladbsservices2.lacity.org/OnlineServices/PermitReport/PcisPermitDetail?id1=16010&id2=10000&id3=05437). Note: Newness is good for condition but limits operational history.
- [official] Greystar and the official site both emphasize the energetic Hollywood setting. Source: Greystar property page (https://www.greystar.com/silhouette-los-angeles-ca/p_21877). Note: Quiet could be decent in an interior unit, but Highland-facing exposure still needs verification.

## Open questions
- Verify whether the exact available unit faces Highland or the courtyard.
- Ask how package intake works after hours and whether there is a staffed desk, locker room, or third-party system.
- Ask how often rooftop, spa, and meeting-room events run late.

## Notes
Silhouette is one of the stronger paper matches so far because it satisfies your core essentials and discloses fees more clearly than many peers. The reason it is not a higher-confidence pick yet is that it just opened, so there is not enough resident evidence to confirm whether Greystar is actually running it smoothly or whether the mixed-use and rooftop program create recurring noise.
